preflight.name: backend-up
preflight.fixHint: docker compose up -d (then wait for the backend healthcheck)

preflight.name: simulator-booted
preflight.run: xcrun simctl list devices | grep -q Booted
preflight.fixHint: Boot a simulator: open -a Simulator, or `xcrun simctl boot "iPhone 16"`

preflight.name: metro-up
preflight.fixHint: Start the dev server: npm start -w apps/mobile
